judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the execute_python step (call_IsKArkOi91iDZG88suDvGkjZ), the agent mistakenly renamed the contingency table columns 'True'/'False' to '1.0'/'0.0', then created new zero-filled 'True'/'False' columns and selected only those, yielding an all-zero table and a NaN chi-square, despite correct data retrieval from clinical (call_TJ1ks7VekWV136vhyypEz9zJ) and mutation (call_AIV1oO3jeg3edobfJfJoeBZb) queries.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent computed the chi-square using only a truncated dataset—clinical records limited to 200 (call_POXIeDzAe66pn6Eqzva8pqaZ) and CDH1 mutations limited to 50 (call_ZsTwTvn3HMvE6steM5WMj773)—and then calculated χ² on this subset (call_TQaZwSU6kmzl1APawI7q0qlS), adding constraints not requested and thus preventing recovery of the ground-truth value.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent computed the chi-square using only a subset of patients because it queried the clinical data with LIMIT 500 (call_NUMdkW3Vwbd69CqLMhVWRsYj) and used that truncated result in the computation (call_vfZajnAjfYTBHGNypnuKfAbb), thereby adding an unrequested constraint and yielding an incorrect statistic.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent computed the chi-square correctly but selected the female BRCA cohort using heuristic ILIKE filters on Patient_description/tumor_tissue_site and regex-extracted barcodes (see the clinical query and execute_python), leading to a slightly different patient set than the ground truth and thus an incorrect statistic.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent truncated the clinical cohort by adding "LIMIT 1000" in the contributing query (call_7v3xcntQKsVmgRobgrnyOSyp), so the chi-square was computed on an incomplete set of female BRCA patients rather than the full cohort, leading to a lower statistic than the ground truth.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
